author: Crystal Carter
title: SEO in 2026: Higher standards, AI influence, and a web still catching up
content: Article exploring SEO trends and predictions for 2026. Carter discusses the dual challenge of optimizing for traditional search engines while adapting to AI search requirements. The piece covers higher standards for content quality, the increasing influence of AI on search behavior, and the gap between web infrastructure and what's required for optimal visibility in both traditional and generative search environments. Emphasizes the need for cross-channel optimization strategies.
